title: Sam and Colby: The Legends of the Paranormal
original_title: Sam and Colby: The Legends of the Paranormal
overview: Paranormal investigators Sam and Colby have hunted ghosts at the world's most iconic haunted locations. Now they set out to investigate a mysterious desert ranch famous for ghosts, UFOs, and terrifying monsters lurking in the dark.
